ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Quod optimus medicus debeat esse chirurgus
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Oratio, habita in Archi-Lycaeo Patavino; die 19 Novembris, 1681. A Carolo Patino equite D. Marci, Doct. Medico Paris. Primario Chirurgiae Professore.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Mentions the Academy in the Dedication to Basadonna, also defined `Academiae Patavinae Moderatori`.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
